title: Today's Core Banking Conundrum: Is your System Ready for Instant Payments?
excerpt: The adoption of instant payments is on the rise among U.S. businesses and consumers. Want to offer instant payments, but are being held back by your legacy Core? Matera CEO and
body:
The adoption of instant payments is on the rise among U.S. businesses and consumers. Want to offer instant payments, but are being held back by your legacy Core? Matera CEO and Co-Founder, Carlos Netto, explains in this BAI Banking Strategies article how you can deploy software alongside your Core to process instant payments 24x7x365.

Read the full article [here](https://www.bai.org/banking-strategies/todays-core-banking-conundrum-is-your-system-ready-for-instant-payments/).
